name: bettercallclaude
description: Swiss Legal Intelligence -- BGE/ATF/DTF precedent research, case strategy, legal drafting, and citation verification across all 26 Swiss cantons with Anwaltsgeheimnis privacy protection.

mcp_base_url.description: Base URL for the BetterCallClaude hosted MCP gateway (entscheidsuche, bge-search, legal-citations, fedlex-sparql, onlinekommentar). Override this if you self-host the stack. Default: https://mcp.bettercallclaude.ch

caselaw_base_url.description: Base URL for the swiss-caselaw SSE MCP endpoint. Default: https://mcp.opencaselaw.ch

ollama_host.description: URL of the Ollama host used by the bundled ollama MCP server (for local-only translation and summarisation). Default: http://localhost:11434

default_jurisdiction.description: Default Swiss canton code for cantonal research (e.g. ZH, BE, GE, TI, VD). Leave blank for federal-only queries.

output_language.description: Preferred output language for agents and drafter output. One of: DE, FR, IT, EN. Default: DE

api_token.description: Optional bearer token for accessing a protected BetterCallClaude MCP deployment. Leave blank for the public service.
